compilation_gate.note: xcodebuild build -scheme Quartz succeeds for both macOS and generic iOS Simulator destinations, proving all #if os() code paths compile

ui_test_matrix.notes: macOS UI tests pass. iPhone/iPad UI runtime tests deferred to GitHub Actions CI matrix with simulator runners.

textkit2_gate_test: TextKit2GateTests — 9 tests verifying NSTextLayoutManager pipeline on both #if os(iOS) and #if os(macOS) paths. No legacy NSLayoutManager fallback.

self_healing.note: heal_performance.sh scans all Presentation/ subdirectories including Widgets/ — no exclusions

notes: Compilation gate proves code builds for all target platforms (macOS + iOS). SPM tests cover data model, logic, accessibility, and performance layers. UI smoke tests run via xcodebuild on macOS. TextKit2GateTests prove no legacy TextKit 1 fallback. Self-heal matrix converges to green.
